rationale: Neither candidate surfaces the one substantive ground-truth concern (yenuo26's question about reduce_scatter test verification), though X's validated notes on FakeGroup's reduce_scatter branch come closest. X delivers concrete, file/line-anchored findings including a genuine grounded catch (int64 vs upstream's int32 in DPMetadata) and a real test-coverage gap (cfg_parallel_size=1 untested), giving it real actionability even though several items are cosmetic nits. Y's review is accurate but mostly a high-level PASS checklist with only one soft non-blocking comment, so despite solid technical grounding it offers far less concrete, actionable feedback than X.
